text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I just don't seem to have any
get-up-and-go.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like I'm sick or anything! I'm still
brimming with youthful energy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the kind of person who gets tired from this
kind of thing! I just feel... a little off sometimes,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back on my game in no time, going full
throttle and getting the whole stadium hyped up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky insists she's fine, but maybe she
needs some rest. It might be good to reassess her
running schedule...
